GpuProjectExec
  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
          GpuHashJoinExec
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([p_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                  GpuFilterExec
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                  GpuFilterExec
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
--- memory ---
total_cost=1840
GpuProjectExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=32, output_bytes=16, cost=48
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=32, output_bytes=32, cost=64
          GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=132, output_bytes=32, cost=164
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152, input_bytes=76, output_bytes=76, cost=152
              GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152, input_bytes=76, output_bytes=76, cost=152
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152, input_bytes=76, output_bytes=76, cost=152
                  GpuFilterExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152, input_bytes=76, output_bytes=76, cost=152
                    GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=76, input_bytes=76, output_bytes=76, cost=152
                      GpuScanExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=76, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=76, cost=76
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=56, output_bytes=56, cost=112
              GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=56, output_bytes=56, cost=112
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=56, output_bytes=56, cost=112
                  GpuFilterExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=176, input_bytes=120, output_bytes=56, cost=176
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=120, subtree_max_row_bytes=120, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=120, cost=120
